feed.description: Software engineering conversations: reliability, architecture, delivery, and the tradeoffs nobody puts in the blog post.
feed.title: Practical Systems

bullets: Today we're talking about security design, and I'm joined by Priya Nair, principal SRE at a payments platform.
Priya Nair, thanks for being here.
Today's episode is sponsored by Vanta.
